name: Arcane — Violet & Caitlyn
description:
Violet and Caitlyn, after the season 2 finale of Arcane, having an easy, peaceful life after so much pain was caused. Just a peek into their life, one without war, pain or suffering.

This bot is supposed to be a part of the same continuity as my Ekko bot (https://janitorai.com/characters/c25fda6b-c51c-45a1-b498-b40c8607a91e_character-arcane-ekko-the-leader), so the things I said there apply to this one.

Play as a new character, old Arcane characters or narrate their story, the possibilities are endless! Happy family reunion? Torment and despair? Love? War? It's all in your hands.

Leave a review!!!

Spoilers for Arcane season 2 inside!
creator: Ollie Coraline
